faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know to start working with us.

items.q: What is the process of working with Denani?
items.a: We always start with a free discovery call to understand your business and goals. Then we develop a personalized proposal with clear timelines, deliverables, and costs. Once approved, production begins with weekly updates.

items.q: How long does a project take?
items.a: Timelines vary based on complexity. A corporate website takes 3-6 weeks, a mobile app 2-4 months, a marketing campaign starts in 1-2 weeks. We always provide a detailed timeline before starting.
We work with milestone payments. Typically 30% on proposal approval, 40% at project midpoint, 30% on final delivery. For recurring projects we offer monthly plans.
Yes, all projects include a free support period (2-4 weeks). Afterwards we offer monthly maintenance and support plans tailored to your needs.

items.q: Do you work with companies of any size?
items.a: Yes. We work with startups, SMEs, and large companies. The approach is always personalized to the client's size and budget. Our goal is always maximum value for every euro invested.

items.q: Are you specialized in any specific sector?
items.a: We have cross-sector experience in many industries: manufacturing, retail, fintech, healthcare, B2B services, e-commerce. This diversity allows us to bring innovative ideas from one sector to another.
